title: YTP Tennis: Captpan Couldn't Save Troy From a Bard's Tail
description:
Thus ends the 6th Battle, by the treachery of rabbits the field is lost. The shight talls, and great is the triumph of beefburgers. The Tennis League... is broken. The last vestage of dope lives in the hidden ping, only sheit troubles the stark ones mindvomit. Only sheit can bring ruin to the slack hoe. Though the land lies down in shrubbery   and the purse lives on a new car shall arise, and a new day shall *&^ again... 

Good game :D
